description: Read-only manifest of selected Logic Lab algorithms for AI agents and MCP search.

entries.title: Elementary cellular automaton
entries.visual_use: Use for rule-based stripes, woven time diagrams, or emergent binary patterns.

entries.title: Hex lattice cellular automaton
entries.visual_use: Use for honeycomb automata, tiling-like growth, or non-square emergent textures.

entries.title: Moss colony growth
entries.visual_use: Use for moss patches, lichen islands, fungal colonies, ground cover, and soft botanical surface growth.

entries.title: Game of Life
entries.visual_use: Use for pulsing grids, emergent colonies, digital organisms, or evolving textures.

entries.title: Koch snowflake
entries.visual_use: Use for crystalline outlines, recursive borders, branching edges, or geometric growth.

entries.title: L-system drawing
entries.visual_use: Use for rule-based plants, symbolic growth systems, or generative line structures.

entries.title: Botanical L-system
entries.visual_use: Use for fern canopies, flowering herbs, vines, ornamental foliage, and plant-like organic silhouettes.

entries.title: Differential growth organic outline
entries.visual_use: Use for ruffled leaves, coral edges, frilled petals, biological membranes, and soft organic borders.

entries.title: Leaf venation growth
entries.visual_use: Use for leaf interiors, plant veins, vascular branching, botanical drawings, and organic networks inside a silhouette.

entries.title: Quadtree spatial partition
entries.visual_use: Use for recursive spatial subdivision, adaptive grids, or efficient point lookup visuals.

entries.title: Space colonization botanical branching
entries.visual_use: Use for tree crowns, root fans, leaf vein structures, plant-like branching, and vascular organic networks.

entries.title: Stochastic tree
entries.visual_use: Use for less regular branching, natural plants, roots, or organic silhouettes.

entries.title: Recursive tree
entries.visual_use: Use for botanical structures, branching diagrams, recursive silhouettes, or growth studies.

entries.title: Evolving bloops
entries.visual_use: Use for artificial life scenes with heredity, survival pressure, and visible variation.

entries.title: Genetic algorithm Shakespeare
entries.visual_use: Use as a compact reference for evolving a target string or explaining GA mechanics.

entries.title: Interactive selection
entries.visual_use: Use for human-guided evolution of forms, flowers, icons, or generative variants.

entries.title: Smart rockets
entries.visual_use: Use for evolved motion trails, goal seeking, obstacle navigation, or generational progress.

entries.title: Apollonian gasket tangent circles
entries.visual_use: Use for recursive tangent-circle packings, fractal circular textures, or curvature-driven compositions.

entries.title: Barycentric triangle interpolation
entries.visual_use: Use for triangle color interpolation, mesh attribute blending, point-in-triangle tests, or spatial weighting.

entries.title: Chaikin curve smoothing
entries.visual_use: Use for softening polygonal paths, organic outlines, hand-drawn smoothing, or subdivision-style linework.

entries.title: Circle packing growth
entries.visual_use: Use for organic bubble fills, pebble textures, masked stippling, or non-overlapping circular layouts.

entries.title: Clifford chaotic attractor
entries.visual_use: Use for dense chaotic point clouds, filament textures, nebula-like forms, or organic mathematical fields.

entries.title: HSV color harmony palette
entries.visual_use: Use for generating harmonious color palettes, animated hue cycling, or HSB-based composition.

entries.title: Complex domain coloring
entries.visual_use: Use for visualizing complex functions, phase fields, singularities, zeros, poles, or analytic symmetries.

entries.title: Convex hull point boundary
entries.visual_use: Use for extracting outer silhouettes from point clouds, collision bounds, or enclosing generative shapes.

entries.title: Cubic Bezier curve
entries.visual_use: Use for smooth custom paths, typographic curves, or controllable motion splines.

entries.title: De Casteljau Bezier subdivision

entries.visual_use: Use for sunflower seed heads, daisy florets, succulent rosettes, pinecone scales, and golden-angle plant compositions.
